item.title: HSN Recalls Kitchen HQ Thermal Insulated Bowls Due to Fire Hazard
item.company: HSN.com, HSN televised shows, and HSN digital shopping platforms from July 2023 through February 2026 for between $20 and $60.
item.brand: HSN.com, HSN televised shows, and HSN digital shopping platforms from July 2023 through February 2026 for between $20 and $60.
item.product: Kitchen HQ Thermal Insulated Bowls with Detachable Hinged Lids
item.summary: This recall involves certain Kitchen HQ brand thermal insulated bowls with detachable-hinged lids. The bowls, which were sold in a variety of colors, have a metal interior and a plastic exterior with the words “KITCHEN HQ” written across the front. Affected models include the 10-cup bowl (SKN 817800), the pair of 10.5-cup and 2-cup bowls sold as a set (SKN 884907), and the 10.4-cup, 6-cup, and 2-cup bowls sold as a set of three (SKN 900600).
item.affectedPeople: Consumers who purchased: Kitchen HQ Thermal Insulated Bowls with Detachable Hinged Lids.
item.remedy: Consumers should stop using the insulated bowls immediately and contact HSN for a full refund on a complete bowl and lid set. A partial refund is also available for consumers who wish to keep the insulated bowls without the lid.
item.payoutAmount: Repair, refund, replacement, or other remedy if stated by the CPSC notice
